did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article summarizing existing literature on AI-powered diagnostic tools in dermatology. It discusses the potential of AI, deep learning, and computer vision (citing the Esteva et al. 2017 study) but does not present original research where the authors used AI/ML to obtain new study results. It is a narrative review rather than an empirical study employing AI methods.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
